title: Juris
description: Unthemed content with interesting invidivual mechanics
body:
Juris is a mod meant to put to test some of my concepts, which makes the content often unconnected but also varied. Currently, Juris adds Magic, Structures, items with special abilities, and mobs with unique mechanics
![Showcase of the see in the dark warden helmet](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeGU3Z3UwM2twNnd4enM0ZDFlcjA4cngwc3R1MHNkamx3bzE4Z2w2ZyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/oZOkC9zN3MkkaDH3Fv/giphy.gif)
The best way to discover Juris mechanics is to experiment with it's items!
